action: Define function with type hints, single responsibility, and clear naming
outcome: Clean readable function with explicit interface
belief: Good Python functions have type hints and single responsibility

action: Read the full traceback top to bottom, identify root cause, fix source not symptom
belief: Always fix root cause not symptoms - symptoms recur, root causes dont

context: design a data model or schema
action: Start with the simplest schema that satisfies current requirements, avoid speculative columns
belief: Start with the simplest schema - evolve only when the need is proven

action: Test behavior not implementation, use real dependencies where possible, avoid mocking internals
belief: Tests should verify observable behavior not internal implementation

action: Read and fully understand first, make one change at a time, run tests between each
belief: Understand fully before changing - blind refactors break things

action: Check for N+1 patterns, missing indexes, and full table scans on large tables
belief: SQL performance problems are almost always missing indexes or N+1 patterns

context: handle an API or external service
action: Always handle timeouts, retries with backoff, and failure cases explicitly
belief: External services will fail - design for failure from the start
